scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --filter @lex-atc/shared dev" "pnpm --filter backend dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @lex-atc/shared test && pnpm --filter frontend test && pnpm --filter backend test
scripts.verify: pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/backend && pnpm dlx dotenv-cli -e ../../.env -- pnpm dlx knex migrate:latest
scripts.db:rollback: cd packages/backend && pnpm dlx dotenv-cli -e ../../.env -- pnpm dlx knex migrate:rollback
